titleStmt.title: SII 18.233: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 233. (B.K. Nos. 118 and 119 of 1932-33.) KABBŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab near the temple of Kallēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 6th year of the reign of Kaṁdhāradeva, Virōdhikṛit, Bhādrapada śu. 14, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1251, August 31, Thursday.
It states that Sēnabōva Lakki-seṭṭi obtained the Heggaḍetana of Kabbūr from the four hundred (mahājanas) of Hāvari, in the presence of Haripāḷadēva.

It also contains a supplementary grant dated in Ānanda, Chaitra ba. 10, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1254, April 13, Monday, f.d.t. ·23. It states that Lachchhaṁ bāyyi, the daughter of Lakki-seṭṭi (apparently the same as the above donee) got a grant of land from Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Haripāḷadēva and the four-hundred (mahājanas) of Hāvēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabalapratāpaca
kravartti śrīvīrakaṁdhāradēvavaruśada 6 neya virōdhikritusaṁva
tsarada bhādrapada suddha 14 brihaspativāradaṁdu sēnabōva la
kkiseṭṭikabbūra heggaḍetanamaṁ hāvēriya nānūrbbariṁ
haripāḷadēvarirdaḍaṁ Ēkabhōgamāgire paḍedaṁ .
© bhūmiya staḷa gauṁḍageṟeya keḷage gadde kaṁba 55 kavaḻageṟe
ya paḍuvagōḍiya jīgu kaṁba 25 jiḍugūra dāriya Erekaṁ
ba 200 vūriṁda mūḍa Ālūradāriyiṁ teṁka hakkalu kaṁ
ba 200 yī sāṁmyavanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrado
ḷu sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇarumaṁ kavileyanaḻida
paṁcamahāpātakanakkuṁ . © © © © ©
This portion is in a blank space on
riṁge gā
ṇada mā
neṁṇe hegga
ḍegoḷaga [Ā]ya
dāya sahi
tava hāḍadā
loṁkemujīThese letters are engraved at the
ya
Ānaṁdasaṁvatsarada caitra ba 10 sōmavāradaṁdu śrīmanmahāThis record is engraved below B.K. No. 118 and is given a of 1932-33. But as the contents relate to the above record, it was thought fit to give this here.
maṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ haripāḷadēvanuṁ hāvēri nānūrvaruṁ la
kkiseṭṭiya magaḷu lacchaṁbāyyihasaranoppi sidalli
koṭṭa bhūmi gavuḍageṟe kōḍiya kaṁba 60
damaged
Digital edition of SII 18.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
